race.comment: ENTERPRISE LUCIA (2) has a solid record over this sprint journey with four wins and two placings from 12 attempts and will be rock-hard fit for this contest. Should get a gun run in transit from gate four and looks the one they all have to run down. HIDDEN NUGGET (6) got the job done over this course and distance last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory. Looms as the main danger. THUNDERING SOUL (4) has won over this course and distance, draws the inside alley and gets 3kg off with the claim. Ticks a few boxes. THATS ARCHIES GIRL (12) resumes here but has won when first-up before and can run a big race while fresh. The well-related JACKA STANDS ALONE (5) (half to G3 winners Raiment and Tallieur) next in line.
